provisions.title: AMENDING LEY DE HACIENDA
provisions.content:
-435-

    MILITARY GOVERNMENT O F SANTO DOMINGO.
              Executive Order No. 648
             Amending Law o f Pensions.
                  0 . G. No. 3237.

    By virtue of the powers vested in the Military Government
of Santo Domingo, the following Executive Order is hereby pro-
mulgated :
   ARTICLIE 1. Article 3 of Executive Order No. 456 entitled
“Law of Pensions af 1920” is hereby amended to read a’s f ~ l l o w:s
   . “Article‘3. Every officer and employee of the Dominican
Republic, regardless of citizenship or length of service, shall be
entitled to the benefits of this law if permanently disabled in
the line of duty and through n o miscon-duct or fault on his part”.
     ARTICLE 2. This Order shall not be retroactive in its
effects.
    ARTICLE 3. All laws o r parts of ilaws in conflict here-
with, are hereby repealed.
                                    S. S. ROBISON,
                           Rear-Admiral, United States Navy,
                          Military Governor of Santo Domingo.
Santo Doming9 City, D. R.,
July 9, 1921.
